chapter: ANATOMY AND FUNCTION OF UROGENITAL TRACT

differentials.name: Origin:   ureteropelvic junction at intra / extrarenal pelvis
differentials.raw: Origin:   ureteropelvic junction at intra / extrarenal pelvis

context: =  retroperitoneal muscular conduit that carries urine from renal pelvis to urinary bladder Histo: (a) inner cell layer of watertight urothelium surrounded by (b) outer layer of smooth muscle → coordinated contraction
